summary:
PROPHETIC VISION OF NEW YORK CITY: Brandon describes a vivid vision where he witnessed New York City consumed by fires, with smoke enveloping the Statue of Liberty up to her neck. He observed a mass exodus of wealthy individuals fleeing the city due to future political decisions. Brandon explains that God conveyed the message that the seed is the ballot, meaning that voting corrupt leaders into power will result in a harvest of corruption, a reprobate mind, and severe consequences for the city based on the biblical principle of sowing and reaping.

CONFIRMATION THROUGH DAVID WILKERSON: Brandon shares that God directed him to a past prophetic warning by David Wilkerson, which was later sent to him by a prayer warrior. He shares Wilkerson's prophecy, which predicted thirty days of unprecedented chastisement, a thousand fires across all boroughs, and absolute chaos in New York City. Wilkerson warned of collapsing economies, rampant crime, halted transportation, and an exodus of the affluent, characterizing these events as God's warnings against the city's rebellion and wickedness. Brandon confirms that Wilkerson's words perfectly align with his own vision of a ruined, burning city and mass migration southward.

MYSTERY BABYLON AND POLITICAL WARNINGS: Brandon reveals that God identified New York City as the prophesied Mystery Babylon facing imminent judgment. He transitions into urgent political warnings, stating that former President Biden will soon pass away and Gavin Newsom's time is running short. Brandon emphasizes the critical need to pray for the safety and health of Donald Trump and his family, warning of domestic threats and Iranian leaders seeking revenge. He urges prayers to expose the hidden corruption within the nation.

NATIONAL MIGRATION AND FUTURE CONTINGENCIES: Brandon foresees a significant demographic shift, with massive numbers of people relocating from the East Coast toward central regions like Chicago and Ohio. He notes that the severity of these events hinges on upcoming elections. If a specific corrupt individual is elected, Brandon warns of a dark blanket falling over the region, accompanied by the collapse of financial institutions and massive migrations. However, he concludes by clarifying that the outcome is not yet finalized, as God emphasized that the people still retain the power of choice through their vote.
rawData: [November 9, 2025]-[The Lord has warned us for decades that this was coming]-[https://youtu.be/11sPAR1XXmE]-[But I have seen a mass exodus of all the rich people leaving New York because of the decisions that will be made in the future. I saw New York City on fire. I saw fires all throughout New York City. I could see the Statue of Liberty, and there was smoke rolling all around the atmosphere above the Statue of Liberty, even at her neck level. There was fire smoke from inside the city, and I could see burning, but I saw a mass exodus of all the rich people leaving New York because of the decisions that will be made in the future. I saw the Lord said, "The seed is the ballot." For when they vote a wrong person into power, they vote corruption into power, and the seeds they sow for corruption, Brandon, bring forth a reprobate mind in the city. For seedtime and harvest never cease. Whatsoever a man sows, that will he also reap. He said there's a time to live and there's a time to die; there's a time to sow and there's a time to reap; a time to plant and a time to harvest. But He kept going over things and telling me this is because they sow this way. So I saw all the rich people leaving. I saw a mass of hundreds of thousands of people leaving New York City in this vision. And the Lord showed me David Wilkerson's face. And He said, "Remember what he said. Go look at what he said. I gave a word through him." And I was like, "David Wilkerson? I have not even thought about David Wilkerson since I was a kid." It's not one that I listen to. But the Lord said, "I spoke a warning through David Wilkerson, a prophetic warning years ago. Go study it and find it." One of you amazing prayer warriors said, "Hey Brandon," and told Diana through email, "this is the word that David Wilkerson gave." Now I want you to hear this prophetic word from David Wilkerson. We have it, and we're going to play it for you. I want you to hear what he prophesied would come as people vote in the wrong people. I stood in this pulpit two weeks ago, and it took every bit of Holy Ghost courage He could give me to say what I had to say, but I have felt this for weeks. I believe that New York City's in for 30 days of chastisement such as America's never seen in any American city. I see at least a thousand fires burning in every borough. Every business that's on the brink right now, deciding whether to move out of the city, will move. There's a hemorrhage already, and the economic basis is collapsing. We're a third-world city already. I don't care what Mayor Dinkins says, it's a third-world city. We have a murder every hour on the hour now, major crime every 20 seconds. This is murder city, and I believe that we're going to see such chaos and anarchy in New York City coming. I don't know when, but I don't think it's too far off, and I don't know what's going to set it off. There will be no planes, trains, or anything coming into this city for probably two weeks. And all those who have money and are able will escape. And New York City, our crown city, because of its absolute rebellion against God, its absolute sinfulness and wickedness, is going to be chastised. And this is God. He could have sent hydrogen bombs from Russia before this society collapsed and wiped us off the map, but no, He gives us warnings. He slaps our wrist and says, "Look, I'm talking to you." And that's what AIDS is; it's a message. All of these calamities, they're messages. And God's saying, "Wake up." So that was the word. And I feel like when I heard that word, I said, "That's exactly what I saw." I saw thousands of fires burning inside New York. I saw a mass exodus of people leaving New York, but it would become a ruinous heap. There was judgment set in. I'm telling y'all folks, it was bad. I'm talking people were leaving from New York City again, and I saw them going south. They were like, "We're out of here." The Lord spoke to me and He said, "Mystery Babylon is coming." Mystery Babylon is coming, and that is probably controversial to a lot of people because there are a lot of people who believe that Rome's mystery Babylon. You have all these other places, but the Lord spoke to me specifically about New York. And He said it's coming, and just warning you to pray over President Trump's health. Because the enemy has a plan, but God has a greater plan. And we have power and authority over the enemy. I saw Gavin Newsom's time coming up short. I saw former President Biden getting ready to go home soon. I saw him being buried. Because, of course, he's old, so it's not like it's a shocker. Brandon, he's a prophet of confirmation if he goes home tomorrow. Everybody's going to go home, right? But the Lord said it's coming. So we pray over Trump and his kids, because if they can't get to him, they try to get to what he loves the most: his grandkids, his kids. And I'm telling you folks, these people are wanting revenge for their leaders in Iran. There's an enemy within, and we must pray for uncovering, for a pulling back, for the turning on of the light exposing the cockroaches that are in our nation. And there are some cockroaches up in here. I see people making big decisions: relocation. This is a lot of people moving from the East Coast coming to the center again. I see people moving like the Chicago area, all around Ohio. I see them moving, relocating. They're being stirred on the East Coast, coming down. Big decisions will be made all around New York and these areas. Darkness is trying to set in. Mystery Babylon; I'm telling you, great mystery Babylon. It will be like a dark blanket. If they choose this man, I see a dark blanket blanketing, and people will flee. I hear the word flee; they will leave by the tens of thousands, if not hundreds of thousands. People, I see them fleeing as if he's voted in. People will know that this is the end. Father, You know if he'll be voted in or not. What I'm hearing You say is what I'm seeing is going to happen. He said, "No, they still have a choice." They have a choice to vote. He's held a veil. I don't see the outcome, but I see the outcome if they vote this way concerning this man. I see a dark cloud, a dark blanket over them. And I see financial structures falling. I see the financial institutions, like all the money, falling. I see a fleeing of the city. Like people, "We're out of here." It's like a mass migration is coming.]
